title.en: China-to-Vietnam Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入越南：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入越南：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Vietnam TCVN / IEC safety references, MOIT and EVN grid-connection expectations, rooftop solar rules, 50 Hz re-validation, and EMC or radio-module requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与越南 TCVN / IEC 安全参考、MOIT 与 EVN 并网要求、屋顶光伏规则、50 Hz 重新验证以及 EMC 或无线模块要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與越南 TCVN / IEC 安全參考、MOIT 與 EVN 併網要求、屋頂光伏規則、50 Hz 重新驗證以及 EMC 或無線模組要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, TCVN scope determination, MOIT approval, EVN grid-connection approval, rooftop-solar eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, developers, and installers should verify current Vietnam standards, electricity regulations, EVN interconnection procedures, rooftop-solar rules, EMC/radio obligations, customs, and project requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、TCVN 适用范围裁定、MOIT 批准、EVN 并网批准、屋顶光伏资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、开发商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行越南标准、电力法规、EVN 并网流程、屋顶光伏规则、EMC/无线义务、海关及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、TCVN 適用範圍裁定、MOIT 批准、EVN 併網批准、屋頂光伏資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、開發商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行越南標準、電力法規、EVN 併網流程、屋頂光伏規則、EMC/無線義務、海關及專案要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Vietnam, the main gaps are Vietnam TCVN / IEC 62109 safety evidence requested by projects or buyers, MOIT and EVN grid-connection review including anti-islanding evidence, rooftop-solar eligibility under current self-consumption and DPPA rules, 50 Hz grid re-validation against Vietnam settings, and EMC or radio-module compliance where the product design is in scope.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口越南时，主要差距包括：项目或买方要求的越南 TCVN / IEC 62109 安全证据、MOIT 与 EVN 并网审查及防孤岛证据、现行自发自用和 DPPA 规则下的屋顶光伏资格、按越南参数进行的 50 Hz 电网重新验证，以及产品设计落入范围时的 EMC 或无线模块合规。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口越南時，主要差距包括：專案或買方要求的越南 TCVN / IEC 62109 安全證據、MOIT 與 EVN 併網審查及防孤島證據、現行自發自用和 DPPA 規則下的屋頂光伏資格、按越南參數進行的 50 Hz 電網重新驗證，以及產品設計落入範圍時的 EMC 或無線模組合規。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
